Date: The month and year when the CRM report was generated.
Online_Scheduler_Used: The number of customers who used the online scheduler in the CRM to schedule a digital test drive during the specified month.
Vehicle_Purchased: The number of customers who made a vehicle purchase after scheduling a digital test drive using the online scheduler.
Conversion_Rate: The percentage of customers who made a vehicle purchase after scheduling a digital test drive using the online scheduler.
